chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3195 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of main case. 28.04.2025 Mr.Enayetullah Khan, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr.Sibtain Muhammad, Advocate for Respondent (K.M.C.) The present petition has been filed against K.M.D.C. (Karachi Medical & Dental College), however, learned counsel remains unable to demonstrate that the said respondent falls within the category of person per Article 199 of the Constitution. Even otherwise, this appears to be a recovery suit couched as petition, which cannot be entertained. While the petitioners remain at liberty to assail their rights before the forum of appropriate jurisdiction, no case is made out to entertain this petition. Petition being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
